title: tanishqnikose9302/Academic-RAG-System
summary: 该系统基于Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)技术，利用Python、Streamlit、FAISS、Sentence Transformers和大型语言模型（如Gemma/Llama）构建学术问答系统，实现智能文档理解。系统通过索引和向量搜索加速文档检索，并利用缓存机制提高推理性能，适用于学术研究和教育领域。
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based Academic Question Answering System using Python, Streamlit, FAISS, Sentence Transformers, and Large Language Models (Gemma/Llama) for intelligent document understanding.
